_description: The same six families tested under multiple metrics — the evidence that apparent modularity is measurement-dependent. Each pass is a causal ablation vs a size-16 random null. 'modular' verdicts are point-rule unless noted; the consolidation run (independent corpus + CIs) is authoritative (see consolidation_verdict.json).

code.note: no detectable accuracy effect (n=60, single seed; underpowered to separate redundancy from a small real effect)
largest effect of any capability, but entangled; the 0.00 accuracy result (n=60, underpowered) does not mean the experts are idle — they clearly process code text

capability_problem_nll.purpose: metric-confound control: under the same NLL metric as languages, capabilities are still 0/3 selective -> the lang-vs-cap dissociation is not an accuracy-vs-NLL artifact

capability_solution_nll.metric: teacher-forced NLL on the gold solution (capability-faithful)

math.note: point-modular here; does NOT survive CIs in the consolidation run

language_belebele_accuracy.note: near-ceiling (0.89-0.96), random null ~0 -> low power / uninformative null

language_flores_nll.metric: NLL on FLoRes-200 passages (reached via Belebele, which is built on them)
language_flores_nll.note: language corpus #1; es modularity here is overturned on the independent Wikipedia corpus (corpus #2), which is the corpus-dependence finding

fragility_summary.ar: modular across NLL metrics and the independent corpus -> robust
fragility_summary.es: modular on FLoRes-200 passages, NOT on independent Wikipedia (corpus-dependent)
fragility_summary.math: entangled under accuracy, selective under solution-NLL point, not under CIs (metric/statistics-dependent)
fragility_summary.code: no detectable accuracy effect (n=60, underpowered), large but entangled under NLL (metric-dependent)
